data_window: 2026-06-02 10:21 to 2026-06-05 10:21 Asia/Shanghai; GitHub repositories recently updated, visibly active, or showing strong product traction in AI agents, voice agents, browser agents, RAG, agent governance, and AI workflows.
source_summary: Live GitHub repository pages and README evidence; local GitHub API/gh access unavailable because gh is not installed and curl DNS resolution for api.github.com failed.
trend_observations: Voice-agent stacks are moving from demo bots to self-hostable production platforms; desktop/browser/computer-use agents are adding repeatability, sandboxing, and background execution; RAG products are converging with agentic wiki, IM integration, and MCP approval; agent governance is emerging as a separate runtime layer.
assumptions: Prioritized product-shaped repositories with runnable UI/CLI/API, Docker or package install paths, examples, documentation, screenshots, or production deployment claims. Growth signals use visible GitHub stars, forks, commit counts, issues/PRs, release markers, and README update notes from live pages; no clone/run audit was performed.
markdown_report:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-05

数据窗口：2026-06-02 10:21 至 2026-06-05 10:21（Asia/Shanghai）。

关键假设：GitHub API 在本地不可用（`gh` 未安装，`api.github.com` DNS 失败），因此本次采用实时 GitHub 仓库页/README 证据；未 clone 或实际运行仓库。分数偏向产品形态、可运行性、场景清晰度、近期活跃与可复刻价值。

## Top Projects

1. dograh-hq/dograh - Voice Agent Platform - Score 92
   - GitHub: https://github.com/dograh-hq/dograh
   - 做什么：开源、自托管的 Vapi/Retell 替代方案，用拖拽工作流构建生产级语音 agent。
   - 面向谁：要部署客服、销售、电话自动化或语音交互流程的团队。
   - AI native 点：LLM/STT/TTS/BYOK、MCP native、telephony、workflow builder 是核心产品面。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 4.2k stars、842 forks、535 commits、16 issues、12 PRs，README 有产品截图、文档、云端入口和对比表。
   - 可运行性判断：有 `docker-compose.yaml`、`docker-compose-local.yaml`、API/UI/SDK/docs/examples；适合优先本地复刻。
   - 建议动作：优先试跑本地 Docker，拆解 workflow builder + voice runtime 架构。

2. Tencent/WeKnora - RAG Knowledge Agent Platform - Score 90
   - GitHub: https://github.com/tencent/WeKnora
   - 做什么：把文档转成可查询 RAG、自治推理 agent 和自维护 Wiki。
   - 面向谁：企业知识库、内部问答、IM 知识助手、私有化 RAG 团队。
   - AI native 点：ReAct agent、MCP 工具、web search、Wiki Mode、知识图谱、Feishu/Notion/Yuque 同步和 IM 渠道集成。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 15.1k stars、1.9k forks、1,670 commits、153 issues、30 PRs；v0.5.2 更新包含 MCP HITL approval、Wiki graph、Yuque connector、CLI preview。
   - 可运行性判断：仓库包含 frontend、docker、helm、mcp-server、cli、docs、examples、docker-compose。
   - 建议动作：跟踪 Yuque/Feishu connector + agentic wiki，抽取为内部知识库实验。

3. github/gh-aw - Agentic Workflow CLI - Score 88
   - GitHub: https://github.com/github/gh-aw
   - 做什么：用自然语言 Markdown 编写 agentic workflow，并在 GitHub Actions 中运行。
   - 面向谁：希望把 issue triage、代码维护、自动修复、仓库运营流程放进 CI 的工程团队。
   - AI native 点：agent workflow 作为 repo 原生工件，支持 Copilot、Claude、Codex、Gemini，并带 guardrails 与 human approval。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 4.6k stars、415 forks、12,531 commits、192 issues、9 PRs；README 有近期版本退役提醒和安全架构说明。
   - 可运行性判断：有 CLI、安装脚本、docs、actions、Dockerfile、quickstart。
   - 建议动作：做一个“每日仓库维护/PR 评论处理”workflow 小实验。

4. trycua/cua - Computer-Use Agent Infrastructure - Score 87
   - GitHub: https://github.com/trycua/cua
   - 做什么：为能控制完整桌面环境的 computer-use agents 提供 sandboxes、SDK、benchmarks 和 driver。
   - 面向谁：构建桌面自动化、GUI agent、系统级评测环境的 AI infra 团队。
   - AI native 点：agent 可在 macOS/Windows/Linux 桌面中后台点击、输入、验证，面向 Claude Code、Cursor、Codex、MCP/custom clients。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 17.6k stars、1.1k forks、3,478 commits、123 issues、230 PRs。
   - 可运行性判断：有 docs、examples、demo、notebooks、Dockerfile、Package.swift、pyproject、tests。
   - 建议动作：加入 Watch+实验，评估是否能支撑浏览器/桌面 agent benchmark。

5. browserbase/stagehand - Browser Agent SDK - Score 86
   - GitHub: https://github.com/browserbase/stagehand
   - 做什么：用自然语言和代码共同控制浏览器，把 AI-driven 操作转成更可维护的自动化。
   - 面向谁：生产环境 web 自动化、数据抽取、QA、运营流程自动化团队。
   - AI native 点：`act`、`agent`、`extract`、preview、auto-caching、self-healing，把 LLM 灵活性和代码确定性结合。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 22.9k stars、1.5k forks、1,310 commits、95 issues、138 PRs；最新 release `@browserbasehq/browse-cli@0.6.1` 标注 Jun 3, 2026。
   - 可运行性判断：`npx create-browser-app`、pnpm build、example script、docs、env example。
   - 建议动作：复用作浏览器 agent baseline，比较 BrowserOperator/Webwright 路线。

6. ShayneP/local-voice-ai - Local Voice Agent - Score 84
   - GitHub: https://github.com/ShayneP/local-voice-ai
   - 做什么：单容器本地实时语音 AI 助手，集成 STT、LLM、TTS、LiveKit 和 Next.js UI。
   - 面向谁：想构建私有、本地或混合云语音助手的个人开发者和小团队。
   - AI native 点：本地 supervisor 管理 LiveKit、llama.cpp、Nemotron/Whisper、Kokoro、LiveKit Agents worker，能按 URL 切换云服务。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 512 stars、162 forks、37 commits，README 给出架构图、Docker、GPU、Apple Silicon 和云 provider 替换路径。
   - 可运行性判断：`docker compose up --build`，本地打开 `localhost:8080`；首次模型下载成本高。
   - 建议动作：作为 voice-agent 最小可复刻样板，重点验证硬件成本与首启体验。

7. macOS26/Agent - Desktop Agent App - Score 82
   - GitHub: https://github.com/macOS26/Agent
   - 做什么：macOS 26 桌面 agent harness，用于 computer use、automation、scripting、coding。
   - 面向谁：希望让本地 Mac 桌面变成可代理操作环境的 power users 和开发者。
   - AI native 点：支持 18+ 本地/云 LLM provider，面向桌面任务、脚本、代码和自动化。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 468 stars、36 forks、591 commits；有 Xcode project、helper、tests、docs、build.sh。
   - 可运行性判断：需要 macOS 26.4.1+；可作为本地 app 源码构建，但系统版本门槛高。
   - 建议动作：Watch，后续若出现稳定 release 或 demo 再做深度体验。

8. DemonDamon/AgenticX - Multi-Agent Platform - Score 80
   - GitHub: https://github.com/DemonDamon/AgenticX
   - 做什么：统一多 agent 平台，包含 Python SDK、CLI、Studio server、Machi desktop app。
   - 面向谁：想统一多 agent 编排、记忆、MCP Hub、IM gateway 和桌面形态的开发者。
   - AI native 点：Meta-Agent、15+ LLM provider、hierarchical memory、avatar/group chat、skill ecosystem、safety sandbox、GUI agent reflection。
   - 增长/活跃信号：约 132 stars、19 forks、2,127 commits；仓库结构完整，有 desktop、deploy、enterprise、examples、tests。
   - 可运行性判断：可 `pip install agenticx`，按 feature extras 安装 memory/document/graph/llm/monitoring。
   - 建议动作：加入长期跟踪；先验证 README 功能是否已稳定落地。

## Watchlist

- ag-ui-protocol/ag-ui - Agent UI Protocol - Score 74 - 14k stars、2,046 commits；`npx create-ag-ui-app` 很顺手，但更偏协议/SDK，等更多产品化 app 模板出现。
- faramesh/faramesh-core - Agent Governance - Score 72 - 60 stars、250 commits、v0.2.0 on May 24；agent tool-call policy daemon 很有趋势价值，但当前更偏治理基础设施。
- openai/codex - Coding Agent CLI - Score 78 - 88.6k stars、7,150 commits；产品影响力极强，但非今日新发现，作为生态基准观察。
- humanlayer/12-factor-agents - Agent Engineering Reference - Score 68 - 原则型内容仓库，适合作为设计参考，不进入产品 Top。

## Skip Reasons

- Supersynergy/awesome-ai-agents-2025：awesome list/目录型内容，缺少单一可运行产品面。
- G1o22/awesome-ai-agents-2026：聚合列表，存在大量二手描述，适合作为发现源，不适合作为 Top 项目。
- VoltAgent/awesome-ai-agent-papers：论文列表，主要是研究导航，非可运行产品。
- QAInsights/awesome-ai-tools：工具清单/目录，缺少可运行仓库产品形态。

## 今日趋势观察

1. Voice agent 开源栈开始从“demo assistant”走向“可部署平台”：Dograh 面向 Vapi/Retell 替代，local-voice-ai 面向单容器私有化。
2. Desktop/browser agent 的主战场在可靠性：Cua 强调后台 computer-use，Stagehand 强调自然语言与代码混合、缓存、自愈。
3. RAG 产品正在合并 agent、wiki、IM、连接器与 MCP 审批：WeKnora 的 v0.5.2 是比较清晰的企业知识产品样本。
4. Agent governance 变成独立层：Faramesh 把每次 tool call 变成可审计政策决策，值得后续跟踪。

## 今日建议动作

- 先试跑 Dograh 或 local-voice-ai，建立 voice-agent 可运行样板。
- 用 Stagehand/Cua 对比一个固定网页任务，观察“可重复执行”和“恢复失败”的工程设计。
- 为 WeKnora 做一张 RAG+Wiki+IM+MCP approval 的产品拆解卡。

top_projects.summary: Open-source, self-hostable Vapi/Retell alternative for building production voice agents with a drag-and-drop workflow builder.
top_projects.audience: Teams building customer support, sales, phone automation, or voice-interaction workflows.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: LLM/STT/TTS orchestration, BYOK, MCP-native workflows, telephony, and workflow builder are the product core.
top_projects.growth_signal: Visible GitHub page shows about 4.2k stars, 842 forks, 535 commits, 16 issues, and 12 PRs.
top_projects.runnability: Has docker-compose files, API, UI, SDK, docs, examples, and product screenshots.
top_projects.recommended_action: Run the local Docker stack and study its voice workflow builder architecture.

top_projects.summary: Open-source LLM knowledge platform that turns raw documents into RAG Q&A, autonomous reasoning agents, and self-maintaining Wikis.
top_projects.audience: Enterprise knowledge-base, private RAG, internal Q&A, and IM assistant teams.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Combines ReAct agent, MCP tools, web search, Wiki Mode, graph exploration, IM channels, and Feishu/Notion/Yuque sync.
top_projects.growth_signal: Visible GitHub page shows about 15.1k stars, 1.9k forks, 1,670 commits, 153 issues, and 30 PRs; v0.5.2 notes include MCP HITL approval and Yuque connector.
top_projects.runnability: Repository includes frontend, docker, helm, mcp-server, cli, docs, examples, and docker-compose.
top_projects.recommended_action: Track and prototype the Yuque/Feishu connector plus agentic wiki flow.

top_projects.summary: GitHub Agentic Workflows lets teams write natural-language Markdown workflows and run them in GitHub Actions.
top_projects.audience: Engineering teams automating repository maintenance, issue triage, and CI-side agent tasks.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Treats agent workflows as repository-native artifacts with provider choice and security guardrails.
top_projects.growth_signal: Visible GitHub page shows about 4.6k stars, 415 forks, 12,531 commits, 192 issues, and 9 PRs.
top_projects.runnability: Has CLI, install script, docs, actions, Dockerfile, quickstart, and security architecture documentation.
top_projects.recommended_action: Create a small repo-maintenance workflow experiment for PR comment or issue triage automation.

top_projects.summary: Open-source infrastructure for computer-use agents that control full desktops across macOS, Linux, and Windows.
top_projects.audience: Teams building desktop automation agents, GUI benchmarks, or controlled computer-use environments.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Enables agents to click, type, and verify in background desktop environments through CLI/MCP/custom clients.
top_projects.growth_signal: Visible GitHub page shows about 17.6k stars, 1.1k forks, 3,478 commits, 123 issues, and 230 PRs.
top_projects.runnability: Has docs, examples, demo, notebooks, Dockerfile, Package.swift, pyproject, and tests.
top_projects.recommended_action: Use as a benchmark substrate for browser and desktop agent reliability experiments.

top_projects.summary: Browser automation framework that mixes natural-language actions with code for production web workflows.
top_projects.audience: Developers building reliable web automation, scraping, QA, and operations agents.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Provides act/agent/extract primitives, preview, auto-caching, and self-healing for LLM-assisted browser control.
top_projects.growth_signal: Visible GitHub page shows about 22.9k stars, 1.5k forks, 1,310 commits, 95 issues, 138 PRs, and a Jun 3, 2026 latest release.
top_projects.runnability: Supports npx create-browser-app, pnpm build, examples, docs, and env examples.
top_projects.recommended_action: Use as a baseline browser-agent SDK and compare against Webwright/BrowserOperator style approaches.

top_projects.summary: Single-container local real-time voice AI assistant with STT, LLM, TTS, LiveKit, and a Next.js UI.
top_projects.audience: Developers and small teams building private local or hybrid-cloud voice assistants.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: One supervisor manages LiveKit, llama.cpp, Nemotron/Whisper, Kokoro, and LiveKit Agents worker with cloud-provider escape hatches.
top_projects.growth_signal: Visible GitHub page shows about 512 stars, 162 forks, and 37 commits, with detailed Docker/GPU/Apple Silicon docs.
top_projects.runnability: Run with docker compose up --build and open localhost:8080; first boot downloads large model assets.
top_projects.recommended_action: Try as the minimal reproducible voice-agent stack and measure first-run hardware/model cost.

top_projects.summary: macOS desktop agent harness for computer use, automation, scripting, and coding.
top_projects.audience: Mac power users and developers exploring local desktop agents.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Supports 18+ local/cloud AI providers and exposes a desktop harness for system-level tasks.
top_projects.growth_signal: Visible GitHub page shows about 468 stars, 36 forks, and 591 commits.
top_projects.runnability: Has Xcode project, helper app, tests, docs, and build.sh; requires macOS 26.4.1 or later.
top_projects.recommended_action: Watch for stable release/demo; revisit when target macOS version is available.

top_projects.summary: Unified multi-agent platform with Python SDK, CLI, Studio server, and Machi desktop app.
top_projects.audience: Developers exploring multi-agent orchestration, memory, MCP hubs, IM gateways, and desktop agent experiences.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Meta-Agent orchestration, 15+ LLM providers, hierarchical memory, avatar/group chat, skill ecosystem, safety sandbox, and GUI reflection.
top_projects.growth_signal: Visible GitHub page shows about 132 stars, 19 forks, 2,127 commits, 8 issues, and complete repo structure.
top_projects.runnability: Install with pip install agenticx; optional extras cover memory, document, graph, LLM, and monitoring features.
top_projects.recommended_action: Track long term and verify which advertised platform components are stable.

watchlist.summary: Event-based protocol for connecting AI agents to user-facing applications.
watchlist.audience: Frontend and agent-platform teams building in-app agent interactions.
watchlist.ai_native_angle: Positions AG-UI as the user-facing complement to MCP and A2A.
watchlist.growth_signal: Visible GitHub page shows about 14k stars, 1.3k forks, 2,046 commits, 181 issues, and 140 PRs.
watchlist.runnability: Has npx create-ag-ui-app, docs, Dojo, apps, integrations, middleware, and SDKs.
watchlist.recommended_action: Watch for richer product templates and evaluate for future agent UI surfaces.

watchlist.summary: Governance-as-code daemon that permits, defers, or denies each agent tool call before execution.
watchlist.audience: Teams shipping agents into environments that require policy, audit, and credential control.
watchlist.ai_native_angle: Moves agent safety from prompt evaluation into deterministic runtime enforcement.
watchlist.growth_signal: Visible GitHub page shows about 60 stars, 13 forks, 250 commits, 2 issues, 7 PRs, and v0.2.0 on May 24, 2026.
watchlist.runnability: Install script plus Homebrew/npx/Go install paths; docs and examples are present.
watchlist.recommended_action: Watch as a governance layer candidate; test once more adapters mature.

watchlist.summary: Lightweight coding agent that runs locally in the terminal.
watchlist.audience: Developers using terminal-based coding agents and automation loops.
watchlist.ai_native_angle: Local agent runtime for code editing, commands, SDKs, and desktop/app entry points.
watchlist.growth_signal: Visible GitHub page shows about 88.6k stars, 13k forks, 7,150 commits, 5k+ issues, and 357 PRs.
watchlist.runnability: Has codex CLI, Rust implementation, docs, SDK, scripts, package metadata, and app references.
watchlist.recommended_action: Keep as ecosystem baseline rather than treating as a fresh daily discovery.

watchlist.summary: Principles for building production-grade LLM-powered software.
watchlist.audience: Agent product engineers and platform architects.
watchlist.ai_native_angle: Encodes product and engineering principles for reliable LLM applications.
watchlist.growth_signal: Visible GitHub page was live during search; used as design reference, not product ranking.
watchlist.runnability: Mostly reference/documentation content rather than a runnable product.
watchlist.recommended_action: Use for design review checklist; do not prioritize as product radar Top item.

skipped_projects.skip_reason: Awesome list / directory of tools, not a single runnable AI native product.
Curated collection with broad secondhand descriptions; useful as discovery source but not product-shaped.
Research-paper list without runnable product surface.
Tool directory / list repository, not a standalone AI application, CLI, API, or workflow product.
